snippet.title: BTS "Butter" - The Late Show with Stephen Colbert
snippet.description:
Global pop icons BTS return to perform their record-smashing new hit, "Butter," ahead of their upcoming livestream event BTS 2021 MUSTER SOWOOZOO which takes place on June 13th and 14th. If you missed it, scroll back to watch RM, Jin, SUGA, j-hope, Jimin, V, and Jung Kook teach Stephen Colbert some new hand gestures in a hilarious Late Show comedy bit! #BTSonLSSC #Butter #BTS

Subscribe To "The Late Show" Channel: http://bit.ly/ColbertYouTube
Watch full episodes of "The Late Show": http://bit.ly/1Puei40
Like "The Late Show" on Facebook: http://on.fb.me/1df139Y
Follow "The Late Show" on Twitter: http://bit.ly/1dMzZzG
Follow "The Late Show" on Instagram: http://bit.ly/29wfREj

Watch The Late Show with Stephen Colbert weeknights at 11:35 PM ET/10:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

---
The Late Show with Stephen Colbert is the premier late night talk show on CBS, airing at 11:35pm EST, streaming online via Paramount+, and delivered to the International Space Station on a USB drive taped to a weather balloon. Every night, viewers can expect: Comedy, humor, funny moments, witty interviews, celebrities, famous people, movie stars, bits, humorous celebrities doing bits, funny celebs, big group photos of every star from Hollywood, even the reclusive ones, plus also jokes.

snippet.title: Islas Feroe, el archipi√©lago m√°s incre√≠ble del mapa
snippet.description:
Las Islas Feroe son un archipi√©lago ubicado en el Atl√°ntico Norte, entre Islandia y Noruega. Si bien dependen del Reino de Dinamarca, cuentan con una cultura e identidad propias. 

Tanto en su capital T√≥rshavn como en los lugares m√°s despoblados nos encontramos con lugares incre√≠bles. Pero m√°s llamativo a√∫n es el trazado de t√∫neles submarinos que construyeron: son m√°s de 20 y hasta inauguraron una rotonda bajo el agua en 2020. 

En nuestro video te invitamos tambi√©n a conocer los motivos de un inesperado cruce cultural: ¬øpor qu√© hay tantos inmigrantes de Filipinas y Tailandia?

en.title: Faroe Islands, the most incredible archipelago on the map
en.description:
The Faroe Islands are an archipelago located in the North Atlantic, between Iceland and Norway. Although they depend on the Kingdom of Denmark, they have their own culture and identity.

Both in its capital T√≥rshavn and in the most unpopulated places we find incredible scenery. But even more striking is the route of underwater tunnels that they built: there are more than 20 and they even inaugurated an underwater roundabout in 2020.

In our video we also invite you to learn about the reasons for an unexpected cultural crossroads: why are there so many immigrants from the Philippines and Thailand?

üåé Un Mundo Inmenso
Singularities of our planet

About Anne-Marie:
Anne-Marie has proved to be one of the UK‚Äôs most exciting and successful British breakthrough pop stars of recent years. A former 3x world karate champion and West End child star-turned 9x BRIT Award nominee, A-M‚Äôs rise has been nothing short of meteoric. In 2018 Anne-Marie released her debut album, ‚ÄòSpeak Your Mind‚Äô which featured the hit singles 'Alarm', 'Ciao Adios', 'Heavy', 'Friends', '2002' and 'Perfect to Me'. She subsequently ended that year as the UK‚Äôs biggest-selling debut artist, selling out headline shows and playing stadium dates supporting long-time friend and champion Ed Sheeran in the process.

She has also sang on and co-written many other hits such as Birthday, Rockabye, Don't Leave Me Alone,  To Be Young, f*ck, i'm lonely and Don't Play, collaborating with the likes of Clean Bandit, Marshmello, David Guetta, Lauv, Rudimental, Doja Cat and KSI, as well as starring on The Greatest Showman: Reimagined soundtrack performing Rewrite the stars alongside James Arthur.

That I made that jump, that leap of faith

snippet.title: Galantis, David Guetta & Little Mix - Heartbreak Anthem (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Galantis, David Guetta & Little Mix - Heartbreak Anthem
Stream/DL: https://atlantic.lnk.to/HeartbreakAnthemID

Subscribe for more official content from Galantis: https://BigBeat.lnk.to/GalantisSubscribe

Follow Galantis
Facebook: http://smarturl.it/GalantisFb
Twitter: http://smarturl.it/GalantisTw
Instagram: http://smarturl.it/GalantisInsta

Follow David Guetta
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DavidGuetta
Twitter: https://twitter.com/davidguetta
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/davidguetta/

Follow Little Mix
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/LittleMix
Twitter: https://twitter.com/LittleMix
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/littlemix/

(LYRICS)
Verse
Hello, it‚Äôs me your ex
I called to say not sorry but I wish you the best 
And I don‚Äôt hold no grudges, promise this ain‚Äôt a test, We ok, we ok
 
Pre
Sometimes it works out but sometimes it don‚Äôt
Maybe we‚Äôll fix this or maybe we won‚Äôt 
Sometimes a heart can sink like a stone 
Until you find home 
 
Chorus
This ain‚Äôt a heartbreak anthem, I don‚Äôt care what happened but I ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it 
Don‚Äôt want to throw a tantrum, you did what you had to, no i ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it 
And I don‚Äôt wanna feel, I don‚Äôt wanna feel hollow
Chasing you and me, chasing all of these shadows
This ain‚Äôt a heartbreak anthem, I don‚Äôt care what happened, but I ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it.
 
Verse 2
Hello, it‚Äôs me your ex (again)
I didn‚Äôt want to call but there‚Äôs this pain in my chest
And thanks to you I‚Äôm wearing out this bulletproof vest but I‚Äôll be ok, I‚Äôm ok
 
Pre
Sometimes it works out but sometimes it don‚Äôt
Maybe we‚Äôll fix this or maybe we won‚Äôt 
Sometimes a heart can sink like a stone 
Until you find home 
 
Chorus
This ain‚Äôt a heartbreak anthem, I don‚Äôt care what happened but I ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it 
Don‚Äôt want to throw a tantrum, you did what you had to, no i ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it 
And I don‚Äôt wanna feel, I don‚Äôt wanna feel hollow
Chasing you and me, chasing all of these shadows
This ain‚Äôt a heartbreak anthem, I don‚Äôt care what happened, but I ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it.

snippet.title: Friends: The Reunion | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
Our favorite friends are back on the set that started it all. Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry, David Schwimmer, and special guests reunite to discuss everything from their casting process to whether or not Ross and Rachel were really on a break. Witness the unbreakable bond of the group that perfectly captured the moment in life when your friends become your family.

Stream Friends: The Reunion May 27 on HBO Max.

snippet.title: Brawl Stars: Meet Squeak! - Brawler Spotlight
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! ‚ñ∫‚ñ∫ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! ‚ñ∫‚ñ∫ https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don‚Äôt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team‚Äôs safe and try to crack open your opponents‚Äô. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you‚Äôre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support ‚Äî or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

snippet.description:
ÌîÑÎ°úÎØ∏Ïä§ÎÇòÏù∏ (fromis_9) 'WE GO' M/V

ÌîÑÎ°úÎØ∏Ïä§ÎÇòÏù∏Ïù¥ ÎÅùÏùÑ Ïïå Ïàò ÏóÜÎäî ÌûòÎìÝ ÏÉÅÌô© ÏÜç, ÎãµÎãµÌïú ÏùºÏÉÅÏóêÏÑú Î≤óÏñ¥ÎÇò ÏÉàÎ°≠Í≥Ý ÌäπÎ≥ÑÌïú Î∞©ÏãùÏùò Ïó¨ÌñâÏùÑ ÏÝúÏïàÌïúÎã§.
ÏßÄÎÇúÌï¥ 9Ïõî ÏÑ∏ Î≤àÏß∏ ÎØ∏Îãà Ïï®Î≤î [My Little Society]Î•º ÌÜµÌï¥ Ïö∞Î¶¨Îì§Ïùò ÏûêÏúÝÎ°úÏö¥ Í≥µÍ∞ÑÏúºÎ°ú Ï¥àÎåÄÌñàÎçò ÌîÑÎ°úÎØ∏Ïä§ÎÇòÏù∏Ïù¥ ÏïΩ 8Í∞úÏõî ÎßåÏóê Îëê Î≤àÏß∏ Ïã±Í∏Ä Ïï®Î≤î [9 WAY TICKET]ÏúºÎ°ú ÎèåÏïÑÏôÄ ÏÉâÎã§Î•∏ ÌûêÎßÅÏùÑ ÏïàÍ∏¥Îã§.
[9 WAY TICKET]ÏùÄ ÌîÑÎ°úÎØ∏Ïä§ÎÇòÏù∏ÎßåÏùò Í±¥Í∞ïÌïòÍ≥Ý ÏÉÅÏæåÌïú ÏóêÎÑàÏßÄÎ•º Îã¥ÏïÑ ÏßÄÏπú ÏÇ¨ÎûåÎì§ÏóêÍ≤å ÌôúÎÝ•ÏùÑ Î∂àÏñ¥ ÎÑ£Ïñ¥Ï§Ñ Ïï®Î≤îÏúºÎ°ú, Ïó¨ÏÝïÏùÑ ÌÜµÌï¥ Í≤ΩÌóòÌïÝ Ïàò ÏûàÎäî Îã§ÏñëÌïú ÏÉÅÌô©Í≥º Í∞êÏÝïÏùÑ 9Ïù∏ 9ÏÉâ Îß§ÎÝ•ÏúºÎ°ú ÌíçÎ∂ÄÌïòÍ≤å Îã¥ÏïÑÎÇ¥ Î¶¨Ïä§ÎÑàÎì§ÏóêÍ≤å Í≥ÝÏä§ÎûÄÌûà ÏÑÝÏÇ¨ÌïúÎã§.

‚ÄúÎÑå Ïñ¥ÎîîÍπåÏßÄ Í∞ÄÍ∏∏ ÏõêÌï¥, ÏûÝÍπêÎßå ÎëòÏù¥ Ï°∞Í∏à Îçî Î©ÄÎ¶¨‚Äù
ÌîÑÎ°úÎØ∏Ïä§ÎÇòÏù∏ÎßåÏùò Î∞ùÍ≥Ý Í±¥Í∞ïÌïú ÏóêÎÑàÏßÄÎ•º ÎäêÎÇÑ Ïàò ÏûàÎäî ÌÉÄÏù¥ÌãÄÍ≥° ‚ÄòWE GO‚ÄôÎäî ÏÉàÎ°úÏö¥ Î∞©ÏãùÏùò Ïó¨ÌñâÏùÑ Ï¶êÍ∏∞Î©∞ ÌñâÎ≥µÌïú ÏàúÍ∞ÑÏùò ÏÝàÏÝïÏùÑ ÌëúÌòÑÌïú Í≥°ÏúºÎ°ú ‚ÄòÎÑàÏôÄ Ìï®ÍªòÎùºÎ©¥ Ïñ¥ÎîîÎìÝ Í∞à Ïàò ÏûàÎã§‚ÄôÎäî ÏÑ§ÎÝàÎäî Î©îÏãúÏßÄÎ•º ÏÝÑÌïúÎã§.

fromis_9 proposes a new and unique getaway from the frustrations of daily life during these challenging times.
Just eight months after the release of their 3rd mini album My Little Society in September 2020, fromis_9 returns with their new single album 9 WAY TICKET to offer listeners a new way of healing and relaxation.
9 WAY TICKET revitalizes listeners with fromis_9‚Äôs uplifting and refreshing energy, and shares the abundance of experiences and emotions felt on an exciting journey through the unique charms of each of the nine members.

# On a special and refreshing adventure ‚ÄúWE GO‚Äù
Filled with fromis_9‚Äôs bright and lively energy, the lead single ‚ÄúWE GO‚Äù is a track that expresses the happiest moment of a new kind of vacation, delivering the sweet message of ‚ÄúI can go anywhere as long as I‚Äôm with you.‚Äù

fromis_9 proposes a new and unique getaway from the frustrations of daily life during these challenging times.
Just eight months after the release of their 3rd mini album My Little Society in September 2020, fromis_9 returns with their new single album 9 WAY TICKET to offer listeners a new way of healing and relaxation.
9 WAY TICKET revitalizes listeners with fromis_9‚Äôs uplifting and refreshing energy, and shares the abundance of experiences and emotions felt on an exciting journey through the unique charms of each of the nine members.

# On a special and refreshing adventure ‚ÄúWE GO‚Äù
Filled with fromis_9‚Äôs bright and lively energy, the lead single ‚ÄúWE GO‚Äù is a track that expresses the happiest moment of a new kind of vacation, delivering the sweet message of ‚ÄúI can go anywhere as long as I‚Äôm with you.‚Äù
